text:
……連携能力を高めるには
パートナーの動きをよく見ること。

……どちらか一方が従属的な
動きをするだけではダメ。

……まず、見ることで
お互いのくせや長所がわかる。
そして、自然と連携できるように……

……それが理想だけど
まずは難しく考えすぎずに
やってみ

If you want to improve how you work in
tandem with your ally, you need to be sure
to observe them.

It's not enough to just have one of you comply
with whatever the other says or does.

First you need to watch. You need to learn
their strengths and habits. It's only then you
will find how to best work together.

That's the best-case scenario, at least. But
let's not get too focused on the details just
yet and simply head out and give it a try.
